title: Rubio Touts 'Progress' on Iran Ahead of Trump Announcement, More
title_cn: 在特朗普宣布更多消息之前，卢比奥吹捧伊朗问题“取得进展”
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Trump to Announce Iran Deal, Rubio: 'Good News' on Hormuz, More

summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Centerbridge in Talks for Stake in Merritt Properties, FT Says
title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称，Centerbridge 正在洽谈收购 Merritt Properties 的股份
summary: A unit of Neuberger Berman is in talks to sell a minority stake in Merritt Properties to Centerbridge Partners, valuing the business at about $3 billion including debt, the Financial Times reported on Sunday.

title: Trump: US 'Close' on Iran Peace Deal, Rubio on 'Progress,' More
title_cn: 特朗普：美国“接近”伊朗和平协议，卢比奥称“进展”等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: Trump to Announce Iran Deal, Rubio: 'Good News' on Hormuz, More
title_cn: 特朗普将宣布伊朗协议，卢比奥：霍尔木兹海峡的“好消息”等等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: South Africa Taps Forensics Expertise in Tax Probe: Sunday Times
title_cn: 南非在税务调查中利用法证专业知识：《星期日泰晤士报》
summary: South Africa’s National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) is tapping private-sector digital forensics expertise as it seeks to boost an investigation into an overhaul of the country’s tax agency under former President Jacob Zuma, the Johannesburg-based Sunday Times said.

title: German Grocer Rewe Mulls Sale of Penny Chain in Italy: Corriere
title_cn: 德国杂货商 Rewe 考虑出售意大利 Penny Chain：Corriere
summary: German supermarket chain Rewe may sell some or all of its Penny Market stores in Italy as it weighs exiting or scaling back its presence in the country, Corriere della Sera reported Sunday, citing sources it didn’t identify.

title: Australia Consulting With Start-Ups After Tax Reform Backlash
title_cn: 澳大利亚在税制改革遭到强烈反对后与初创企业进行咨询
summary: Australia’s center-left government is consulting with small businesses, particularly start-ups, over the implications of a planned clampdown on tax breaks unveiled in this month’s budget, Cabinet Secretary Andrew Charlton said.

title: Secret Service Shoots Man Who Fired Gun Near White House, More
title_cn: 特勤局射杀在白宫附近开枪的男子，更多
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 5:20

title: Trump: Iran Deal Announced Shortly, Shots Fired Near White House
title_cn: 特朗普：伊朗协议即将宣布，白宫附近开枪

title: Trump: Iran Deal Will Be Announced Shortly, Trump's Stock Trades
title_cn: 特朗普：伊朗协议将很快公布，特朗普的股票交易
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 5:22

title: Uber Proposes Delivery Hero Takeover at €10 Billion Valuation
title_cn: Uber 提议以 100 亿欧元的估值收购 Delivery Hero
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has offered to take over Delivery Hero SE in a deal that would value the German delivery company at about €10 billion ($11.6 billion) as it seeks to ramp up competition with DoorDash Inc. outside the US.

title: US & Iran Signal Progress, Trump Trades Suggest Many Strategies
title_cn: 美国和伊朗发出进展信号，特朗普的交易暗示了许多策略
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 6:07

title: US & Iran Signal Progress, Trump Trades Point to Many Strategies
title_cn: 美国和伊朗发出进展信号，特朗普的交易指向许多策略
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 5:29

title: US Group Offering About €2 Billion to Buy Napoli, Athletic Says
title_cn: Athletic称美国集团将出价约20亿欧元收购那不勒斯
summary: Underdog Global Partners is leading negotiations on behalf of a US consortium to acquire SSC Napoli SpA from the De Laurentiis family for about €2 billion ($2.3 billion), The Athletic reported.

title: Trump to CBS: US is "Closer" to Iran Deal, Rubio in India, More
title_cn: 特朗普对哥伦比亚广播公司表示：美国“更接近”伊朗协议、卢比奥在印度等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 0:00

title: JPMorgan Is Vying for Millions of Comics From a Bankrupt Distributor
title_cn: 摩根大通正在争夺破产发行商的数百万本漫画
summary: The bank is owed about $7 million from a company whose assets are languishing in a Mississippi warehouse

title_cn: SpaceX 完成星舰飞行，加巴德辞去 DNI 职务

title: How Singapore Stocks Regained the Lead Over Indonesia
title_cn: 新加坡股市如何重新领先于印度尼西亚股市
summary: Singapore’s return to the top says a lot about what investors want right now.

title: SpaceX Completes Starship Flight, Gabbard Resigns, More
title_cn: SpaceX 完成星舰飞行、加巴德辞职等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 6:21

title: Rep. Ivey "Disgusted" at Settlement Slush Fund, Critiques $1B Ballroom Budget Request
title_cn: 众议员艾维对和解贿赂基金“感到厌恶”，批评 10 亿美元宴会厅预算请求
summary: Rep. Glenn Ivey (D-MD) joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend for a wide-ranging conversation on a possible deal with Iran, the anti-weaponization settlement and more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Mulls Arms Sale to Taiwan, Will Speak to President
title_cn: 特朗普考虑向台湾出售武器，将与总统通话
summary: President Donald Trump indicated he would speak directly with Taiwanese President Lai Ching-te after pausing a $14 billion sale of arms to the country in a move that would risk disrupting newly stabilized ties between the US and China. Ambassador Alexander Yui, Taiwan's representative to the U.S. joined David Gura, Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubio Sees Good News Coming on Hormuz as Iran Talks Continue
title_cn: 卢比奥认为随着伊朗谈判的继续，霍尔木兹海峡将传来好消息
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said there may be “some good news” regarding the blocked Strait of Hormuz in the coming hours, as Iran and Washington press ahead with peace negotiations. Bloomberg's Managing Editor of America's Weekends Kevin Whitelaw, Bloomberg's Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche, and Politico White House Reporter Sophia Cai joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the latest on a possible Iran deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubio Says "Significant Progress" Made on Iran Talks
title_cn: 卢比奥称伊朗谈判取得“重大进展”
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said there may be “some good news” regarding the blocked Strait of Hormuz in the coming hours, as Iran and Washington press ahead with peace negotiations. Bloomberg's Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche and Axios Congressional Reporter Andrew Solender joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rubio Sees Good News Coming on Hormuz as Iran Talks Continue
title_cn: 卢比奥认为随着伊朗谈判的继续，霍尔木兹海峡将传来好消息
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said there may be “some good news” regarding the blocked Strait of Hormuz in the coming hours, as Iran and Washington press ahead with peace negotiations.

title: White House Signals Imminent Deal Announcement with Iran
title_cn: 白宫暗示即将与伊朗达成协议
summary: Bloomberg White House Correspondent Jeff Mason and Bloomberg News Reporter Dan Williams join David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the White House announcement that a deal with Iran to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz is forthcoming. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gunman Killed by Secret Service After Firing Near White House
title_cn: 枪手在白宫附近开枪后被特勤局击毙
summary: Shortly after 6pm Saturday a 21-year-old man approached a checkpoint near 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue and opened fire on Secret Service officers. The agents returned fire, striking the gunman, who was transported to a local hospital and later died. Lisa Mateo on Bloomberg This Weekend gives the latest update on the situation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bond Strategists Warn Yields to Stay High Even If Iran War Ends
title_cn: 债券策略师警告称，即使伊朗战争结束，收益率仍将保持高位
summary: For all the hand-wringing over war-related inflation fears, there are signs that other drivers are having as much a bearing on longer-term borrowing costs.

title: What’s Happening in EM: Political Risk Roils Markets (Podcast)
title_cn: 新兴市场正在发生什么：政治风险扰乱市场（播客）
summary: Maria Elena Vizcaino and Zijia Song discuss the fresh wave of political risk rippling across emerging markets, how they’re affecting financial assets and how investors are positioning for the resurgent jitters.

title: Resurgent Political Risk Derails Rallies Across Emerging Markets
title_cn: 政治风险复苏导致新兴市场涨势脱轨
summary: Investors in emerging markets are getting slammed by a fresh wave of political turmoil that is derailing bets from Latin America to Eastern Europe.

title: More War-Driven Inflation Seen in Fed’s Favored Gauge
title_cn: 美联储青睐的指标显示更多战争驱动的通胀
summary: The Federal Reserve’s favored top-line inflation gauge is rapidly approaching 4% as a war-driven spike in energy costs generates unease that price pressures will broaden.

title: China Coal Mine Blast Tests Limits of Xi’s Energy Security Push
title_cn: 中国煤矿爆炸考验习近平能源安全推动的极限
summary: China’s world-beating coal production has helped shield its economy from the worst of the Iran war shock. Now the deadliest mining disaster in years is raising uncomfortable questions about the cost of that drive.

title: ECB Faces Pressure to Hike as Iran War Feeds Prices, Kocher Says
title_cn: 科赫表示，由于伊朗战争推高价格，欧洲央行面临加息压力
summary: The European Central Bank is heading for an interest-rate increase next month unless a sustainable peace deal between the US and Iran can be found, according to Governing Council member Martin Kocher.

title: LNG Tanker Exits Hormuz for India for First Time Since War Began
title_cn: 液化天然气油轮自战争开始以来首次离开霍尔木兹前往印度
summary: A liquefied natural gas tanker carrying a shipment for India has exited the Strait of Hormuz, the first for the country from the Persian Gulf since the Iran war began months ago as the region’s exporters discreetly supply key buyers.

title: Ebola Spreads Across Congo as Flights Halted, Supplies Run Low
title_cn: 航班停飞、物资短缺，埃博拉病毒在刚果蔓延
summary: Congo suspended flights to the eastern city of Bunia and regional health ministers warned of escalating cross-border risks from Ebola as the outbreak spread across three provinces and overwhelmed contact-tracing efforts.

title: World’s Most Fervent Day Traders in Korea to Get Risky New Tools
title_cn: 世界上最热衷的日内交易者在韩国获得高风险的新工具
summary: The world’s best-performing yet most volatile market is set to debut its first ever single-stock leveraged exchange‑traded funds this week, tools that have the potential to amplify gains and losses.

title: Hungary’s New Premier Warns Predecessor Left Budget ‘Skeletons’
title_cn: 匈牙利新总理警告前任左翼预算“骷髅”
summary: Hungary’s new Prime Minister Peter Magyar said he was hoping for economic growth of about 2% this year but put voters on notice that the state of public finances left by his predecessor made it impossible to make firm forecasts.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/23/2026 | Trump Weighs Iran Options, Tracking The Ebola Outbreak
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 5 月 23 日 |特朗普权衡伊朗选择，追踪埃博拉疫情
summary:
The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by GasBuddy Head of Petroleum Analysis Patrick De Haan, The Points Guy Managing Editor Clint Henderson, Refugees International President Jeremy Konyndyk, Journalist and Author “The Almighty Dollar” Brendan Greeley, Former CIA Director US Army (Ret.) Gen. David Petraeus and Wayback Burger CEO Patrick Conlin.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chanel’s Mega Dividend Brings Owners’ Windfall to $21B
title_cn: 香奈儿的巨额股息为所有者带来意外之财至 $21B
summary: The billionaire family behind Chanel is on track to pocket at least $21 billion from payouts over the past decade, a huge windfall as their brand prospers during a downturn hitting some luxury-good rivals. Angelina Rascouet joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Restaurants Navigate Higher Food Costs as Burger Season Begins
title_cn: 随着汉堡季节的开始，餐厅应对食品成本上涨
summary: Memorial Day weekend marks the unofficial start of summer and burger season. Wayback Burgers President Patrick Conlin joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss changing consumer tastes, rising food costs, and how restaurants are preparing for one of the busiest dining seasons of the year. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Surprising Joys of a Crowded Hiking Trail
title_cn: 拥挤的徒步小径的惊喜乐趣
summary: Many international landmarks have been designed to attract and accommodate enormous numbers of tourists. That’s not the case when it comes to natural scenery. Outdoors types often love to hike for miles into the wilderness precisely to get away from the crowds; those people shudder at the very idea of a 13-mile hike where you’re constantly close to other walkers. Bloomberg News Ideas & Culture Senior Writer Felix Salmon joins Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the surprising joys of a crowded hiking trail. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s 3,711 Trades Point to Multiple Stock-Market Strategies
title_cn: 特朗普的 3,711 笔交易指向多种股市策略
summary: President Donald Trump’s latest financial disclosure has drawn scrutiny for its astonishing scale: 3,711 trades, almost entirely in shares of companies across America, including many whose fortunes can turn on federal policy. Bloomberg News US Equities Team Leader Elena Popina joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Will the Dollar Remain King in a Cashless Society?
title_cn: 美元会在无现金社会中继续保持王者地位吗？
summary: The dollar has been the world's reserve currency for decades, but it's history goes back centuries – to before the United States was  the United States. Brendan Greeley, author of the new book "The Almighty Dollar: 500 Years of the World's Most Powerful Money," joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the currency's history, explain its dominance in global finance, and look ahead to the role it'll play in a world in which cash is no longer king. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Says Its Blockade Against Iran Has Redirected 100 Vessels
title_cn: 美国称其对伊朗的封锁已改变100艘船只的航线
summary: US forces have redirected 100 commercial vessels during its six-week-long blockade of Iran’s ports, Central Command said.

title: US Ebola Aid Plummets 99% Since Last Outbreak
title_cn: 自上次疫情爆发以来，美国的埃博拉援助骤降 99%
summary: Former Executive Director of the USAID COVID-19 Task Force Jeremy Konyndyk joined Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Konyndyk explains to hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini the negative impact of the US withdrawal from the WHO in January and the dismantling of USAID on the public health response. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s 3,711 Trades Point to Multiple Stock-Market Strategies
title_cn: 特朗普的 3,711 笔交易指向多种股市策略
summary: Index-tracking and automated execution appear to be on show in transactions linked to the president.

title: SpaceX Starship Deploys Mock Satellites in Successful Test
title_cn: SpaceX 星舰成功测试部署模拟卫星
summary: SpaceX’s upgraded Starship successfully deployed mock satellites and returned to Earth largely unscathed, though its booster spun out of control and broke apart over the Gulf of Mexico. Bloomberg News Global Space Loren Grush joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bangladesh Central Bank Launches $5 Billion Fund to Spur Growth
title_cn: 孟加拉国央行推出 50 亿美元基金刺激经济增长
summary: Bangladesh’s central bank unveiled a 600 billion-taka ($5 billion) package to boost economic growth, revive shuttered factories and support small businesses.

title: Gas Prices Rise as Summer Holiday Travel Begins
title_cn: 暑假旅行开始，汽油价格上涨
summary: Memorial Day weekend is expected to kick off one of the busiest summer travel season in years, with millions of Americans hitting the roads and airports despite rising costs. GasBuddy's Head of Petroleum Analysis Patrick De Hahn and The Points Guy Managing Editor Clint Henderson joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the climbing gas prices, expensive airfare and what travelers can expect this summer. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Surprising Science Behind Google Searches
title_cn: 谷歌搜索背后的惊人科学
summary: Google Data Editor and Author Simon Rogers joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss his new book "What We Ask Google: A Surprisingly Hopeful History of Humankind." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How New Mega-Cap IPO's Will Reshape the Markets
title_cn: 新的大型IPO将如何重塑市场
summary: SpaceX is marketing itself to IPO investors as an artificial intelligence targeting a $26.5 trillion potential market opportunity. The move signaling its intention to wrest business from investor darlings whose valuations have soared. Bloomberg Market Structure Research Head Larry Tabb joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Watch and Health Efforts Need Reboot to Rival New Wearables
title_cn: 苹果的手表和健康业务需要重新启动才能与新的可穿戴设备竞争
summary: Also: iOS 27 AirPods, Genmoji and AirPlay details.

title: Hyperscaler Debt Flood Brings Derivatives Bonanza
title_cn: 超大规模债务泛滥带来衍生品繁荣
summary: As big tech companies raise hundreds of billions of dollars to fund artificial intelligence investments, Wall Street banks are increasingly finding they have to trade more credit derivatives to keep doing business with the hyperscalers.

title: Nvidia CEO Urges Super Micro to Tighten Up on Compliance
title_cn: 英伟达首席执行官敦促超微加强合规性
summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang urged Super Micro Computer Inc. to tighten up on compliance after Taiwan detained three people this week for allegedly making fraudulent declarations about AI servers made by its US partner.

title: Pointed News Quiz | Retail, Cryptocurrency, Obituaries
title_cn: 针对性新闻测验 |零售、加密货币、讣告
summary: David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo of “Bloomberg This Weekend” play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DeepSeek To Make Permanent 75% Discount on Flagship AI Model
title_cn: DeepSeek 旗舰 AI 模型永久享受 75% 折扣
summary: DeepSeek said it will make permanent a steep discount on its flagship V4‑Pro model, maintaining prices for developers at a quarter of their original level.

title: Automation and AI: Masters in Business with the CEO of Honeywell
title_cn: 自动化与人工智能：霍尼韦尔首席执行官的商业硕士
summary: Barry sits down with Vimal Kapur, Chairman and CEO of Honeywell. They discuss the future of Honeywell as well as Kapur's plan to split the company into three separate entities. They also break down how the company uses automation and what to expect from AI. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bill Winters ‘Lower-Value Human’ Apology Not Enough for Unions
title_cn: 比尔·温特斯的“低价值人类”道歉对工会来说还不够
summary: Bill Winters’ efforts to restore calm after making some controversial comments on AI have failed to reassure labor organizations, according to one of the world’s largest union federations.

title: Hong Kong’s First Astronaut Joins Mission to China Space Station
title_cn: 香港首位宇航员参与中国空间站任务
summary: Hong Kong’s first astronaut, a former police officer with a doctorate in computer forensics, will join a Chinese mission to its space station on Sunday, in what the city’s Chief Executive John Lee described as a “historic moment.”

title: New Zealand to Invest in Drones, Fleet to Shield Maritime Routes
title_cn: 新西兰将投资无人机和机队以保护海上航线
summary: New Zealand intends to spend about NZ$1.6 billion ($936 million) on drones, ship maintenance and naval upgrades to bolster the island nation’s maritime security at a time of increasing concern about supply routes.

title: SpaceX Starship Successfully Lifts Off and Returns to Earth
title_cn: SpaceX 星际飞船成功升空并返回地球
summary: SpaceX’s upgraded Starship successfully deployed mock satellites and returned to Earth largely unscathed, though its booster spun out of control and broke apart over the Gulf of Mexico. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Starship Rocket Takes Off From Texas
title_cn: SpaceX 星舰火箭从德克萨斯州起飞
summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX successfully launched its Starship rocket from Texas. It reached space a few minutes later and deployed 20 dummy Starlink satellites. The closely watched flight is a key demonstration of upgrades from previously launched Starship prototypes, including increasing the rocket’s power and capability. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: S&P 500 Set for Longest Weekly Rally Since 2023 | The Close 5/22/2026
title_cn: 标准普尔 500 指数将迎来 2023 年以来最长的单周上涨 |收盘价 2026 年 5 月 22 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Crossmark Global Investment’s Victoria Fernandez, Wedbush Securities Managing Director Dan Ives, Citi Director of Equity Research Filippo Falorni, Former Fed Governor Betsy Duke, Wealth Enhancement Senior Investment Strategist Ayako Yoshioka, RBC Capital Markets’ Rishi Jaluria, XRC Ventures General Partner Diana Melencio, BCG Managing Director & Partner Julia Dhar & All Elite Wrestling CEO Tony Khan. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Starship Lifts Off in High-Stakes Test
title_cn: SpaceX 星际飞船在高风险测试中升空
summary: SpaceX’s Starship lifts off in a test of a new rocket designed to deliver Elon Musk’s ambitions for human space travel, satellite internet and data centers in orbit. Ed Ludlow reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zoom’s Anthropic Investment Has Netted the Company $1 Billion
title_cn: Zoom 的 Anthropic 投资已为公司净赚 10 亿美元
summary: Zoom Communications Inc., the videoconferencing company, has netted about $1 billion on an investment it made in artificial intelligence startup Anthropic PBC in early 2023.

title: Governance Concerns Over SpaceX IPO & the Upside of Financing AI
title_cn: 对 SpaceX IPO 的治理担忧以及人工智能融资的好处
summary: New York City Comptroller Mark Levine discusses the governance concerns over the SpaceX IPO. He talks about the potential legislative changes that could be made to curb these mega-IPOs. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stellantis, Qualcomm Expand Partnership for Vehicle Tech
title_cn: Stellantis 与高通扩大汽车技术合作伙伴关系
summary: Qualcomm's head of Automotive, Robotics and IoT Businesses Nakul Duggal said that the new vehicle technology partnership the semiconductor company announced with Stellantis will allow the automaker to modernize technology across the board and move fast as the automation and self-driving landscape grows.  Duggal said that the automotive industry is moving quickly and he sees more intelligent cars becoming out over the next few years.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Weighs Chip Tariffs to Spur Domestic Growth, Trade Chief Says
title_cn: 贸易主管表示，美国正在考虑征收芯片关税以刺激国内增长
summary: The Trump administration continues to weigh US tariffs on imported semiconductors to boost domestic chip manufacturing, though there are no immediate plans to impose any new levies, US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said.

title: Bezos’ Blue Origin Plans $600 Million Expansion in Florida
title_cn: 贝佐斯的蓝色起源计划斥资 6 亿美元在佛罗里达州扩张
summary: Blue Origin, the aerospace company founded by billionaire Jeff Bezos, will invest $600 million to expand its Rocket Park campus in Cape Canaveral, Florida, according to a statement from Governor Ron DeSantis.

title: AI’s Expanding Market Grip Traps Active Managers on Wall Street
title_cn: 人工智能不断扩大的市场控制力让华尔街的活跃管理者陷入困境
summary: The AI boom is humbling the humans trying to navigate the markets it increasingly distorts.

title: AI Film ‘Critterz’ Looks for Tech Partner After OpenAI
title_cn: 继 OpenAI 之后，人工智能电影《Critterz》寻找技术合作伙伴
summary: Critterz, a feature-length cartoon intended to showcase how OpenAI’s video-generation capabilities could revolutionize filmmaking, has missed a planned Cannes Film Festival debut after the artificial intelligence company shut down its Sora tool, forcing its creators to look for a new AI partner.

title: Anthropic to Close Over $30 Billion Round as Soon as Next Week
title_cn: Anthropic 最快下周完成超过 300 亿美元的融资
summary: Anthropic PBC is set to close its latest round of funding, which may top $30 billion at a valuation above $900 billion, as soon as next week, according to people familiar with the matter, vaulting ahead of rival OpenAI to become the world’s most valuable AI startup.

title: The Rise of AI Public Safety
title_cn: 人工智能公共安全的兴起
summary:
Axon President Josh Isner joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why Wall Street is misunderstanding the company’s AI strategy. From  drones to enterprise security and public safety software, Isner says Axon is evolving far beyond Tasers and body cameras, and betting aggressively on AI to drive its next wave of growth.
Correction: Corrects the name of a guest in the description. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Micron CEO on Expanding US Chip Production, Memory Demand
title_cn: 美光首席执行官谈扩大美国芯片产量和内存需求
summary: Micron President and CEO Sanjay Mehrotra discusses the company's significant expansion of DRAM manufacturing in the US. Speaking with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall, Mehrotra highlights the importance of this advanced memory technology for critical sectors such as automotive, aerospace, defense, industrial and networking. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: House Panel to Probe Insider Trading on Prediction Markets
title_cn: 众议院小组将调查预测市场的内幕交易
summary: The House Oversight Committee is investigating how customers of Kalshi and Polymarket could be using non-public information to engage in insider trading, escalating concerns about prediction markets after some suspiciously well timed trades.

title: Goldman's Kaplan on Warsh as Fed Chair, Rates and AI
title_cn: 高盛卡普兰谈沃什担任美联储主席、利率和人工智能
summary: Robert Kaplan, Goldman Sachs vice chair and former president of the Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas, expects Kevin Warsh to be an "excellent" Fed chair. Speaking with Julie Fine, Kaplan also discusses the shift in market expectations over the past eight weeks, from anticipating a rate cut later in the year to now considering a possible rate increase or no change due to persistent inflation and elevated oil prices. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Halts Starship Launch, Lenovo Soars on AI Growth | Bloomberg Tech 5/22/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 停止星际飞船发射，联想因人工智能增长而飙升 |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 22 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down what comes next after a critical Starship launch was scrubbed, and he discusses what that means for the space company's planned mega IPO with a SpaceX alumni and an early investor. Plus, an exclusive conversation with Lenovo CFO Winston Cheng after the world-leading PC maker soars post-earnings on strong AI growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lenovo CFO Weighs In on Strong AI Growth
title_cn: 联想首席财务官谈人工智能的强劲增长
summary: Shares of Lenovo soared in Hong Kong trading Friday after the company reported strong growth in AI-related earnings, offsetting challenges from rising component prices. Winston Cheng, CFO of Lenovo, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Comes Next After SpaceX Halts Starship Launch
title_cn: SpaceX 停止星舰发射后接下来会发生什么
summary: SpaceX delayed a critical test of its massive Starship rocket after a pin tied to the launch tower mechanism failed to retract during the final countdown. The setback comes just a day after the company formally filed for an IPO. Laura Crabtree, CEO of Epsilon3 and former SpaceX engineer, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Touts Influence in Midterm Primaries
title_cn: 特朗普在中期初选中宣扬影响力
summary: Trump jumped in to the Texas runoff as he and his political team are feeling emboldened by having recently vanquished Republican candidates in Indiana and Louisiana deemed insufficiently loyal. Bloomberg Texas Bureau Chief Julie Fine joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss Trump endorsing Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the upcoming GOP Senate primary runoff over Senator John Cornyn. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nigeria’s Tinubu Secures Nomination for 2027 Presidential Vote
title_cn: 尼日利亚蒂努布获得 2027 年总统选举提名
summary: Nigerian President Bola Tinubu further strengthened his hand as the ruling party’s top candidate in next year’s presidential elections after winning overwhelming support in primaries against sole challenger Stanley Osifo.

title: US Sees Iran Deal Slipping Past Sunday as Trump Says No Rush
title_cn: 由于特朗普表示不着急，美国预计伊朗协议将在周日推迟
summary: President Donald Trump said the US won’t “rush” into a deal with Iran, saying both sides must take their time to “get it right.”

title: Alaska’s Oil Revival Sparks a New Energy Rush Into the Arctic
title_cn: 阿拉斯加的石油复兴引发新能源热潮进入北极
summary: When John Kurz left Alaska’s North Slope in 2009, he was staring at a grim future for what had once been the country’s premiere oil field.

title: Southern African Leaders Vow Steps to Tighten Border Controls
title_cn: 南部非洲领导人誓言采取措施加强边境管制
summary: Leaders of the Southern African Development Community agreed to deepen regional integration in an effort to curb illegal migration as anti-foreigner sentiment rises in South Africa.

title: Turkish Police Raid Opposition CHP’s Offices After Standoff
title_cn: 土耳其警方在对峙后突袭反对派共和人民党办公室
summary: Turkish police entered the main opposition CHP party’s headquarters in Ankara using pepper spray, acting to seize control of the building after Kemal Kilicdaroglu, the party’s court-appointed chairman, had sought government support to oust rival Ozgur Ozel.

title: Lukashenko and Macron Hold Rare Phone Call, Belta Says
title_cn: 贝尔塔称卢卡申科和马克龙罕见通电话
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron and his Belarusian counterpart Alexander Lukashenko held a rare phone call on Sunday, the state-run Belta news agency reported.

title: Trump Doctor Visit Renews Health Scrutiny as 80th Birthday Nears
title_cn: 特朗普 80 岁生日临近之际，他的医生来访更新了健康审查
summary: President Donald Trump’s upcoming medical examination is intensifying health-related scrutiny that has surrounded him ever since his first campaign for the nation’s highest office more than a decade ago.

title: Benin’s Wadagni Sworn In After Vote Clouded by Opposition Ban
title_cn: 贝宁瓦达尼在投票后宣誓就职，因反对派禁令而蒙上阴影
summary: Romuald Wadagni was sworn in as Benin’s new president on Sunday after winning an election widely seen as consolidating the country’s policy direction over the past decade.

title: India Says US ‘Reliable’ Energy Source as It Seeks More Fuel
title_cn: 印度称美国为“可靠”能源来源，寻求更多燃料
summary: India sees the US as a “significant and reliable” energy partner, Foreign Minister S. Jaishankar said after meeting US counterpart Marco Rubio, who called ties between the two nations “one of the most important” globally.

title: Russia Fired Oreshnik Missile at Ukraine as Part of Barrage
title_cn: 俄罗斯向乌克兰发射奥列什尼克导弹作为弹幕的一部分
summary: Kyiv came under a massive Russian drone and missile barrage early on Sunday that included an Oreshnik ballistic missile, President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said, hours after he and the US embassy warned of an imminent strike.

title: Starmer’s Lame Duck Status Risks Policymaking Paralysis in UK
title_cn: 斯塔默的跛脚鸭状况可能导致英国政策制定瘫痪
summary: Britain will have to wait weeks, if not months, for confirmation that it’s getting a new prime minister. And the gears of government are starting to slow as the political drama plays out in Westminster.

title: Trump Says He’ll Announce Negotiated Deal With Iran Shortly
title_cn: 特朗普表示他将很快宣布与伊朗谈判达成的协议
summary: President Donald Trump said that a peace deal with Iran has been “largely negotiated” and he plans to announce an agreement shortly that would reopen the strategic Strait of Hormuz.

title: Secret Service Shoots Man Who Fired Gun Near White House
title_cn: 特勤局射杀在白宫附近开枪的男子
summary: A man was shot by US Secret Service agents near the White House on Saturday after he opened fire with a handgun, according to a statement from the agency.

title: Bolivia’s Paz Says Protests Test Democracy Ahead of Talks
title_cn: 玻利维亚总统帕兹称抗议活动在会谈前考验民主
summary: Anti-government protests and persistent roadblocks in Bolivia are testing the country’s transition to a democracy that’s open to the world economy, embattled President Rodrigo Paz said in an interview Saturday with Bloomberg Television’s Wall Street Week.

title: Ukraine Says It Hit Russia’s Key Oil Terminal on Black Sea
title_cn: 乌克兰称袭击了俄罗斯黑海主要石油码头
summary: Russia and Ukraine struck each other’s energy infrastructure, hitting oil facilities in a key Russian Black Sea port as well as gas and oil assets in two Ukrainian regions.

title: Trump to Force Foreigners Seeking Green Cards to Go Home First
title_cn: 特朗普强迫寻求绿卡的外国人先回家
summary: Foreigners seeking permanent residency in the US will now have to leave the country to apply for green cards, a change with potentially far-reaching ramifications for legal immigration amid President Donald Trump’s sweeping crackdown.

title: Anti-Government Protest Kicks Off Serbia Election Campaign
title_cn: 反政府抗议拉开塞尔维亚竞选活动
summary: Tens of thousands of people protested in Serbia’s capital against the government, seeking to keep up pressure on President Aleksandar Vucic even after he backed holding an early election in the fall.

title: Iran, US Signal Progress in Peace Talks as Issues Unresolved
title_cn: 伊朗和美国表示和平谈判取得进展，但问题尚未解决
summary: Iran said talks on a peace deal with the US focused on ensuring fighting ends on all fronts are progressing and that other key points of contention will be ironed out at a later stage.

title: US Reaches Limit of Sanctions Power in Targeting Iran’s Economy
title_cn: 美国针对伊朗经济的制裁力度已达极限
summary: The Trump administration launched its “Economic Fury” campaign to hobble Iran’s economy with sanctions more than a month ago. So far, the country is unbowed.

title: Alberta Premier Stakes Political Future on Canada Secession Vote
title_cn: 艾伯塔省省长将政治前途押在加拿大分裂国家公投上
summary: Alberta Premier Danielle Smith’s decision to call a referendum that could lead to the energy-rich province separating from Canada has angered both sides of the debate and triggered calls to challenge her leadership.

title: France Bars Israel Minister Ben Gvir Over Treatment of Activists
title_cn: 法国禁止以色列部长本·格维尔对待活动人士
summary: France banned Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben Gvir from entering the country, citing threats and violence against activists who were trying to get aid to Gaza by sea.

title: Japan’s Akazawa Says He Spoke Briefly With China Commerce Minister
title_cn: 日本赤泽称他与中国商务部长进行了简短交谈
summary: Japanese Trade Minister Ryosei Akazawa and Chinese Commerce Minister Wang Wentao had a brief chat on Friday, the first ministerial-level exchange of words between the two nations since a diplomatic standoff started in November.

title: How a ‘Cockroach’ Jibe United India’s Disgruntled Jobless Youth
title_cn: “蟑螂”嘲笑如何团结印度心怀不满的失业青年
summary: The “Cockroach Janta Party” is one of India’s most viral movements taking aim at the country’s political establishment. Behind the memes and satire is a deeper story about youth unemployment, political frustration and why Gen Z Indians are increasingly speaking up. Bloomberg's Akriti Sharma explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Denmark’s Frederiksen Nears Third Term After Rival Talks Fail
title_cn: 竞争谈判失败后丹麦首相弗雷德里克森即将第三任期
summary: Denmark’s caretaker Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen emerged as the frontrunner to win a third term after record-long government talks swung back in her favor.

title: Mehmet Oz Shuffles Leadership at Medicare and Medicaid Agency
title_cn: 穆罕默德·奥兹 (Mehmet Oz) 调整医疗保险和医疗补助机构的领导层
summary: US Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services Administrator Mehmet Oz is reorganizing leadership roles at the agency, a spokesperson told Bloomberg.

title: Rubio Invites India’s Modi to Visit White House as Ties Improve
title_cn: 随着关系改善，卢比奥邀请印度莫迪访问白宫
summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio met Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi in New Delhi on Saturday and invited him to visit the White House, as the two sides work to improve ties.

title: Russia Is Turning the Screws on Armenia Over Its Tilt to Europe
title_cn: 俄罗斯因亚美尼亚向欧洲倾斜而对其施压
summary: Armenia’s pivot toward the West is coming under increasing pressure from Vladimir Putin’s Russia as the South Caucasus nation prepares for parliamentary elections next month.
